photos.title: my first day
photos.talk: this is my master, he kindly decided to let me have fun and walk around with him. i really like him and he never treats me bad!

photos.title: working :^(
photos.talk: he is working again, but seems to be having fun. i still remember he promised me to go for a walk one day!

photos.title: we're going out! finally!
photos.talk: YAY!!! we are putting on more clothes and heading for a walk...i am SO excited and i heard master say it is still chilly outside. so that explains all the excessive clothing

photos.title: GRASS
photos.talk: this is my first time seeing grass!! omg it's soooooo green...

photos.title: rainy..
photos.talk: today i saw rain...insane experience, gladly my master covered me with an umbrella! unbellivable though, water falling from the sky!

photos.title: rain again
photos.talk: it is raining again! i nearly drowned in all that water, but hey!! this umbrella came in handy. after the rain stops you start appreciating the normal weather a little bit more.

photos.title: vending machines!
photos.talk: BLOODSUCKERS!! TRAITORS!..is what my master said when he showed me these things, they are called vending machines! apparently, they eat green paper and give plastic with food(?) inside. i am not sure why people walked to it and did that though!@

photos.title: other humans
photos.talk: today i was taken by my master on a train ride! sooo many humans!! they are all so different, but yet the same...i wonder if they walk their cameras out..

photos.title: umbrella again!
photos.talk: rain!!! rain!! rain! beautiful, but dangerous type of weather as i am now aware..but umbrella was there again! my master told me that this is a great umbrella and it is from the same place where andy warhol's works are stored!
